name: GH_DocumentAssociations
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.Kernel.GH_DocumentAssociations.)

constructors.name: GH_DocumentAssociations
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_DocumentAssociations class

methods.name: Associate
methods.signature: public void Associate(string rhinoFile, string grasshopperFile)
methods.summary: Add an association between a Rhino and a Grasshopper file. If a similar association already exists, it will be overwritten. This function reads and writes to the disk, it is SLOW. Only call it when you KNOW something changed.

params.name: grasshopperFile
params.doc: Path to Grasshopper ghx or gh file.

methods.name: GetGrasshopperAssociations
methods.summary: Find all the Grasshopper ghx files that have been associated with a given Rhino file.

returns.doc: A list of files, ordered chronologically (most recent association first)

methods.name: GetRhinoAssociations
methods.summary: Find all the Rhino 3dm files that have been associated with a given Grasshopper file.

returns.doc: A list of files, ordered chronologically (most recent association first)
